The '''Censorious Tempest Nebula''', often just shortened '''Censorious Tempest''', lay on the outermost reaches of the [[Karthakk system]]. Because of the nearby [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] field, there was frequently electrical outbursts which gave the nebula its name.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
